case_title: MATTESON ERIC DBA GULFSPRAY SEAFOOD VS MAGNOLIA PLACE et al

docket_entries.description: NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR MAGNOLIA PLACE WHO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO THIS ACTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATTESON ERIC DBA GULFSPRAY SEAFOOD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAPIDOS JACK $1,419.37 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,427.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT MAGNOLIA PLACE
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIDOS JACK EACH PARTY TO BEARY THEIR OWN COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,419.37 FILED BY MATTESON ERIC DBA GULFSPRAY SEAFOOD AS TO DEFENDANT MAGNOLIA PLACE LAPIDOS JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LAPIDOS JACK HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIDOS JACK
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATEMENT RE JACK LAPIDOS WAS ERRONEOUSLY NAMED AS A PARTY HE HAS NO PERSONAL LIABILITY
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-19-1990, GRANTED
